heading: Voluntary vehicle identification standards
label: 33107 Voluntary vehicle identification standards

children.heading: .—Election To Inscribe or Affix Identifying Marks
children.label: a .—Election To Inscribe or Affix Identifying Marks
children.text: The Secretary of Transportation by regulation may prescribe a vehicle theft prevention standard under which a person may elect to inscribe or affix an identifying number or symbol on major parts of a motor vehicle manufactured or owned by the person for purposes of and related provisions. The standard may include provisions for registration of the identification with the Secretary or a person designated by the Secretary.section 511 of title 18

children.heading: .—Standard Requirements
children.label: b .—Standard Requirements
children.text: The standard under this section shall be practicable and provide relevant objective criteria.

children.heading: .—Voluntary Compliance
children.label: c .—Voluntary Compliance
children.text: Compliance with the standard under this section is voluntary. Failure to comply does not subject a person to a penalty or enforcement under this chapter.

children.heading: .—Compliance With Other Standards
children.label: d .—Compliance With Other Standards
children.text: Compliance with the standard under this section does not relieve a manufacturer from a requirement of a standard prescribed under section 33102 or 33103 of this title.
